title: WolfTpmDev private struct missing Debug derive
description: connection.rs: WolfTpmDev is a private struct that wraps a Box<WOLFTPM2_DEV>. It is missing #[derive(Debug)]. In idiomatic Rust, nearly all structs should derive Debug so that containing types (WolfTpmLinuxDev, WolfTpmSwtpm) can also derive Debug. Without it, users cannot print transport types for diagnostics. WOLFTPM2_DEV is an opaque C type so the inner derive may need a manual impl, but the outer type should at least try.
